heading: Reporting payments made to witnesses before Committee on Standards of Official Conduct
label: 4713 Reporting payments made to witnesses before Committee on Standards of Official Conduct
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law or any other rule or regulation, any information on payments made by the Committee on Standards of Official Conduct of the House of Representatives to an individual for attendance as a witness before the Committee in executive session during a Congress shall be reported not later than the second semiannual report filed under in the following Congress.section 5535 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified as a note under prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 104b of this title

Change of NameCommittee on Standards of Official Conduct of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Ethics of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Twelfth Congress, .Jan. 5, 2011
